import React from "react"; export default function SettingsPanel({ settings = {}, onUpdateSettings = () => {}, onLogout = () => {}, onEditProfile = () => {}, onChangeUsername = () => {}, onEditStatus = () => {}, onOpenBlocked = () => {}, onOpenVisibility = () => {}, onOpenDataSharing = () => {}, onReportProblem = () => {}, onOpenMyRooms = () => {}, onOpenDiscoverPrefs = () => {}, onOpenHelp = () => {}, onOpenAbout = () => {}, onOpenTerms = () => {} }) { const { mentions = true, invites = true, waveAlerts = false, sounds = true, haptics = true, analytics = false, visibility = "friends", language = "English" } = settings; const Section = ({ title, children }) => (

{title}

{children}
); const Item = ({ icon, label, hint, trailing, onClick }) => ( ); const Toggle = ({ checked, onChange }) => ( ); return (

onOpenVisibility(visibility)} /> onUpdateSettings({ analytics: value })} />} onClick={onOpenDataSharing} />
); }
